name: Graham Cracker Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely crush the graham crackers.
2. Cream together the peanut butter and butter using an electric mixer until soft and smooth.
3. Beat in the powdered sugar until smooth, then beat in the crushed graham crackers until well blended and moist.
4. Spread the mixture into a 13x9x2 inch pan.
5. Melt the chocolate morsels and pour over the mixture.
6. Refrigerate for 3 or 4 hours before cutting into bars.
